steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What do you use to smell?
What do you use to look?
What do you use to speak?

steps.title: My Happy Face
steps.text: This is my face. I have two big eyes. I have a small nose. My mouth is smiling. I am happy!

steps.audio_text: This is my face. My eyes are green, and my nose is big. My mouth is smiling.

questions.question_text: I have one ___. (Vocabulary question)
I have two ___. (Grammar question)
True or False: I have two noses.
Which part do we use to see?

lessons.title: Listen and Look
lessons.topic: Auditory and decorative parts of the head

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What do we listen with?
questions.hint: You have two on the sides of your head.

questions.question_text: What do we see on the top of our head?
questions.hint: It can be long or short and you can comb it.

questions.question_text: What part of your face moves when you smile?
questions.hint: You use it to eat, talk, and smile.

steps.title: My Funny Face
steps.text: Look! This is my funny face. I have small ears and big blue hair. My head is round. Can you hear me with your ears?

steps.explanation: Say what color a part is.

steps.audio_text: Look, this is my head! I have two small eyes and big ears.

questions.question: Are the ears big or small?

questions.question_text: I ___ happy today.
Which word means 'the thing on top of your head'?
True or False: 'My ears are big.' uses body parts.
What's missing? My head is ___. (Grammar question)
How many ears do you have?

lessons.title: My Whole Head
lessons.topic: Reviewing the head as a whole

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What protects your eyes from too much sun?
questions.hint: You wear them on your face.

questions.question_text: What do you use to brush your hair?
questions.hint: It has teeth that go through your hair.

questions.question_text: What do you wear to keep the sun off your face?
questions.hint: It's round and sits on your head.

steps.title: Big Smile, Small Nose
steps.text: I have a big smile. This is my nose. It is small. The elephant has big ears. They are very large!

questions.question: Is my nose big or small?

steps.explanation: Use big or small to talk about size.

steps.audio_text: Hello! This is my friend. She has a big smile and small, brown eyes. Her ears are tiny, too!

questions.question: Are the ears big or small?

steps.title: My Whole Head Lesson Review Quiz

questions.question_text: I have a ___ smile. (Vocabulary question)
Complete: I have [Adjective] [Body Part]. What could be the sentence?
True or False: Ears can be big or small.
Which part of the face do you use to hear?
What word describes a 'tiny' size?

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What helps you to smile and say cheese?
questions.hint: It's what you use to eat yummy food!

questions.question_text: Which part of your face lets you smell flowers?
questions.hint: It's in the middle of your face!

questions.question_text: Where do you wear glasses to see better?
questions.hint: You close them when you sleep!

steps.title: Funny Face
steps.text: This is my funny face! I have two big blue eyes. I have one small orange nose. My mouth is big and smiles a lot. Do you like my face?

questions.question: How many noses does it have?

steps.audio_text: This is my friendly cat! She has two small, green eyes and a tiny, pink nose. I love her soft, fluffy tail.

questions.question: What color are the cat's eyes?
How many eyes does the cat have?

steps.prompt: Say: I have a big head and two small ears.
steps.expected_text: i have a big head and two small ears

questions.question_text: I ___ a big, fluffy cat. (Grammar question)
Which emoji shows 'eyes'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: 'Big' and 'Small' are sizes. (Comprehension question)
What do you use to hear music?
This is my nose. How many noses do I have?
